title: polygala cruciata f. alba
intro: Polygala cruciata f. alba, also known as White Milkwort, is a perennial plant species in the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Eastern Asia, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to promote health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Polygala cruciata f. alba can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
